DP.456.0000:
Oak: Ah, [0103,0000]!
This is it! This is Pal Park!\f
DP.456.0001:
Oak: Ah, [0103,0000]!
This is it! This is Pal Park!\f
DP.456.0002:
Pokémon from around the country
can be brought here.\f
In other words, Pokémon from
places like Kanto and Hoenn.\f
This place also happens to be where
you compete to see how quickly you\r
can catch those Pokémon!\f
DP.456.0003:
It’s good to see you’ve come
to join us for a visit.\f
Let me make a gift of this Trainer
Counter for your Pokétch.\f
DP.456.0004:
Oak: I plan to be in Eterna City
for some time.\f
Being here, I should make the best
of my time studying the Pokémon of\r
the Sinnoh region.\f
DP.456.0005:
Pal Park is so scintillating!\f
Trainers and Pokémon are so full of
intent here!\f
DP.456.0006:
I’ve never seen some Pokémon.
Would you show me if you had one?\f
DP.456.0010:
Let me see...\f
A Pokémon that does nothing but
eat and sleep.\f
DP.456.0011:
Oh, a SNORLAX?
It sure looks like it can eat!\f
I have a Pokétch app that has
a SNORLAX motif.\f
You can have it for showing me
a real SNORLAX!\f
DP.456.0012:
Doesn’t that [0118,0000]
make you want to cook something?
DP.456.0013:
Let me see...\f
A Pokémon that changes color
whenever something happens.\f
DP.456.0014:
Oh, a KECLEON!
How colorful!\f
I have a Pokétch app that features
a KECLEON design.\f
You can have it for showing me
a real KECLEON!\f
DP.456.0015:
Changing colors can change your
mood, too.
DP.456.0019:
What was that Pokémon’s name now...?
Oh, it’s on the tip of my tongue!
DP.456.0020:
Pal Park is so scintillating!\f
Trainers and Pokémon are so full of
intent here!\f
Are you taking the challenge, too?
DP.456.0021:
Welcome to Pal Park!\f
This is where top-notch Trainers come
to demonstrate their Pokémon-catching\r
techniques to their peers.\f
...Oh?\f
Are you maybe...
Ah, you are [0103,0000]!\f
We’ve all heard rumors about you!
Word is, you’re a hotshot Trainer?!\f
We’d be honored if you would
participate in our Catching Shows.
DP.456.0022:
Welcome to Pal Park!\f
This is where top-notch Trainers come
to demonstrate their Pokémon-catching\r
techniques to their peers.\f
...Oh?\f
Are you maybe...
Ah, you are [0103,0000]!\f
We’ve all heard rumors about you!
Word is, you’re a hotshot Trainer?!\f
We’d be honored if you would
participate in our Catching Shows.
DP.456.0023:
Yes! You agreed to participate!
It’s a happy day for me!\f
Let’s not waste any time!
Let me explain how Pal Park works.\f
I wrote the Pal Park manual for
situations just like this.\f
What should I explain?
DP.456.0024:
Pal Park is a place where you are
timed on the catching of six Pokémon.\f
You are provided with six special
Poké Balls for the challenge.\f
Participating Trainers are required to
supply the six Pokémon that are to\r
be caught.\f
If you do not supply the stock of six
Pokémon, you may not participate in\r
the Catching Show.\f
...Do you want me to explain anything
else?
DP.456.0025:
At the start of the Catching Show,
you will be given six Park Balls.\f
Use the Park Balls to catch the
six Pokémon you provide.\f
...Do you want me to explain anything
else?
DP.456.0026:
You may make Pokémon migrate from
Kanto or Hoenn to stock your\r
Catching Game.\f
Insert a Game Boy Advance Pokémon
Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, FireRed,\r
or LeafGreen in the Game Pak Slot.\f
When your DS is turned on, currently
caught Pokémon can migrate from\r
the Game Pak to the DS Game Card.\f
...Do you want me to explain anything
else?
DP.456.0027:
Pokémon caught in Sinnoh may also
be used to stock your Catching Game.\f
Please ask the guy next to me who’s
in charge of stocking Pokémon.\f
...Do you want me to explain anything
else?
DP.456.0028:
Would you like to take part in
a Catching Show now?
DP.456.0029:
Aww, that’s too bad.\f
Well, just give me a shout if you’d
like to participate.
DP.456.0030:
Hi there, [0103,0000]!\f
Did you come to participate in
a Catching Show?
DP.456.0031:
Hi there, [0103,0000]!\f
Did you come to participate in
a Catching Show?
DP.456.0032:
OK, here are your Park Balls!\f
[0103,0000] received
six Park Balls.\f
The current record holder is
[0103,0001] with [0135,0002] points.\f
OK, off you go, [0103,0000].\f
Dazzle us with a masterful display
of Pokémon catching!\f
DP.456.0033:
OK, here are your Park Balls!\f
[0103,0000] received
six Park Balls.\f
The current record holder is
[0103,0001] with [0135,0002] points.\f
OK, off you go, [0103,0000].\f
Dazzle us with a masterful display
of Pokémon catching!\f
DP.456.0034:
Oh, hold on. You don’t have enough
Pokémon for a Catching Show.\f
You’ll need to stock us with six
Pokémon to participate.\f
You should make some Pokémon migrate
from Kanto or Hoenn!
DP.456.0035:
Very well, let me explain how things
work around here.\f
I’ll read to you from the Pal Park
manual I wrote.
DP.456.0036:
I’m sorry you had to retire.
We hope you try harder next time.\f
I’ll take what Park Balls you
have left.\f
Next time, please do stay to catch
all six Pokémon.
DP.456.0037:
Oh, your PC Boxes are filled. You
have no room for six more Pokémon.\f
You won’t be able to accept them,
even if you do catch them.\f
Make enough room in a PC Box and
come back for your Catching Show.
DP.456.0038:
Congratulations!
That’s all six Pokémon caught!\f
The audience sure enjoyed watching
your Catching Show.\f
All right, let’s see your all-important
score from this show!\f
...
...\f
Catching Points: [0135,0000]!\f
Time Points: [0135,0001]!\f
Type Points: [0135,0002]!\f
The total is...\f
...
...\f
[0135,0003] points!\f
DP.456.0039:
Wow! That’s an outstanding record!
Kudos to you!\f
DP.456.0040:
Good! That’s a decent record.
Props to you!\f
DP.456.0041:
Would you like to put all the Pokémon
you’ve caught in PC Boxes?
DP.456.0042:
Done!
Your Pokémon have been boxed away.\f
You’ll now have to save the game.\f
DP.456.0043:
Oh, then it might be fun for you to
go for an even better score by\r
trying to catch these six again.\f
If you want to do another Catching
Show, just come see us!
DP.456.0044:
If you want to do another Catching
Show, come see us again!
DP.456.0045:
It’s time for your prize!
Here you are!\f
DP.456.0046:
Would you like to do another Catching
Show with the same Pokémon?
DP.456.0052:
I came to see [0103,0000]’s Catching
Show with Daddy.\f
I hope it starts soon...
DP.456.0053:
Eek! [0103,0000]!
Your Catching Show was fantastic!\f
I hope I can become an expert
Trainer like you one day!
DP.456.0054:
Oh, [0103,0000]!
I hope you do better next time.
DP.456.0055:
[0103,0000], my daughter is a big
fan of yours.\f
A day doesn’t go by without her
demanding we come see Catching Shows.
DP.456.0056:
People come here not only to see
the Catching Show.\f
We get to see rare and exotic
Pokémon on top of the catches.\f
The excitement gets me all jacked up!
DP.456.0057:
The current record holder is
[0103,0001] with [0135,0002] points.\r
Can you top that?
DP.456.0058:
Oh! You’ve topped 2,000 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
DP.456.0059:
Keep working on getting a higher
score!
DP.456.0060:
Oh! You’ve topped 2,500 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
DP.456.0061:
Oh! You’ve topped 3,000 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
DP.456.0062:
Oh! You’ve earned 3,500 points!
You’ve earned this, then!\f
DP.456.0063:
You’ve set an incredible record!
There’s nothing left to say!
DP.456.0064:
Your Bag is full.
You should come back later.
DP.456.0065:
I’ve heard Trainers complain that
rare Pokémon take longer to appear.\f
Is it easier to start with common
Pokémon?
DP.456.0066:
The Catching Show...\f
It’s a head-on clash of will and
wits between Trainer and Pokémon.\f
I especially look forward to seeing
Pokémon from Kanto and Hoenn.\f
But it tugs at my heartstrings to
know they’re so far away from home.
DP.456.0067:
Your performance left my heart
aflutter today...\f
I must crown you with this...
Crown.\f
Oh, before you get the wrong idea,
it’s an Accessory for Pokémon.\f
DP.456.0068:
Your performance left my heart
aflutter today...\f
I feel compelled to give you this
Tiara.\f
Oh, before you get the wrong idea,
it’s an Accessory for Pokémon.\f
DP.456.0069:
Your performance left my heart
aflutter today...\f
I wish you would take this
“Seafloor” Backdrop.\f
Please try using it when dressing up
your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
DP.456.0070:
Your performance left my heart
aflutter today...\f
I wish you would take this
“Underground” Backdrop.\f
Please try using it when dressing up
your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
DP.456.0071:
Your performance left my heart
aflutter today...\f
I wish you would take this
“Sky” Backdrop.\f
Please try using it when dressing up
your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
DP.456.0072:
Not only are there Catching Shows,
there are also Pokémon Contests...\f
It’s so dreamy...
Sinnoh sets my heart aflutter.
